message:
refactor(test): migrate pages_fts test from rusqlite to frankensqlite (native, no compat)

Per the project invariant (NEVER use rusqlite — frankensqlite ONLY),
tests/pages_fts.rs should have been on frankensqlite from the start.
The prior port used a mix of RusqliteConnection (setup) + FrankenConnection
(assertions). Consolidate on frankensqlite alone.

tests/pages_fts.rs:
- Drop the `rusqlite::Connection as RusqliteConnection` import;
  everything now goes through `FrankenConnection`.
- Add a small `open_franken_db(path: &Path) -> Result<FrankenConnection>`
  helper that handles the `&Path -> &str` conversion (frankensqlite's
  `Connection::open` takes a `&str`, not `&Path`), so the ~6 test
  fixtures aren't each re-implementing the path-to-string dance.
- Rewrite `setup_fts_source_db` to use the frankensqlite API directly:
    * `conn.execute(sql)` for parameterless DDL/DML (no second
      `&[]` arg, since frankensqlite's execute doesn't take one).
    * `fparams![...]` (re-exported `frankensqlite::params`) for
      the handful of parameterized inserts.
- Callers that previously passed `[]` as the empty-params tail are
  simplified to the no-argument form.
- No test assertions changed; just the driver migration so the
  test compiles clean against the frankensqlite-only rule.

`.beads/issues.jsonl` + `.beads/last-touched` bump from br sync.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
